Comment: Mid. He's tough, but so is the course material. Very generous with partial credit. He's not approachable at all, so I would read the textbook at times. I did learn a lot from him, but sometimes he's lazy (ex: puts wrong answers on the answer key, "it's very easy, right?"). This class is just rough in general, and he's ok.
Tags: Lots of homework, Lecture heavy, Accessible outside class

Comment: I would say his lectures were pretty good in explaining the topics/covering them and he provides a lot of practice problems. The topics aren't easy to explain if you have never seen them before so I think he did the best he could at teaching them. The final project is very tedious and unrelated to the previous coursework, I would change it.

He's a below average explainer who zooms through slides quite often but still expects you to know what to do. Gotta learn most stuff by yourself. 1 week quiz and the next week HW and it repeats. 3 midterms and an optional final, some similar to HW problems. Grades very generously with a very good curve. Very long unnecessary project worth only 10%!
Tags: Lots of homework, Get ready to read, Test heavy
